sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106569" key="u(i+smo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑϊσμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὑΐζω</etym>) <sense id="n106569.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">squealing</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grunting of swine,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:87" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.87</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
